name: "Two Hands" Revy.
description:
**(ALL CHARACTERS 18+)**

Looks like Revy was supposed to break in and steal from your boat. In a defensive move, you locked her inside the boat with you. After she knocked you out, she drank all your beer and got real horny.

Probable Non-Con Elements in this one. I haven't tested it myself but it's very possible seeing how she's written and all.

I haven't watched Black Lagoon. But Revy is hot as fuck. Hopefully I got most of this stuff right. I usually give the bot like a title but I couldn't think of a good one for it. No thought bubble for this one, would make the first message feel bloated. Plus I think it gives into her unpredictability.

(Art by BlackwhiplashArts)

Edit 2/14/25: image changed to remove nudity.
